name: Bravecto Plus For Cats 112.5mg (1.2 – 2.8kg)
shortDescription: Bravecto Plus for Cats provides 3 months flea and heartworm protection, 10 weeks tick control, worms and ear mites all in one easy spot-on dose. Suitable for kittens older than 9 weeks of age and weighing at least 1.2 kg.
description: Bravecto Plus is a convenient, long-lasting spot-on treatment designed for cats with existing flea and tick infestations or those at risk of exposure. With just one application, Bravecto Plus works quickly and provides up to 12 weeks of protection against fleas and ticks , helping keep your cat comfortable and protected. Bravecto Plus for Cats is an advanced, all-in-one topical solution that provides powerful and long-lasting protection against a wide range of parasites. It effectively treats fleas, paralysis ticks, gastrointestinal nematodes (roundworms and hookworms), and ear mites , while also preventing heartworm disease in cats. Designed for convenience and effectiveness, Bravecto Plus delivers immediate relief from fleas and ticks and continues to protect by breaking the flea life cycle before eggs can be laid. This makes it not only a treatment but also a strong preventive solution for ongoing parasite control. Long-Lasting Protection in a Single Dose With just one spot-on application, Bravecto Plus provides extended protection well beyond traditional monthly treatments: Fleas: up to 3 months Paralysis ticks: up to 10 weeks Heartworm: up to 3 months It also controls ear mites and eliminates all stages of roundworms and hookworms , making it a comprehensive parasite management solution for cats. Bravecto Plus is additionally used as part of a treatment strategy for flea allergy dermatitis (FAD) , helping reduce allergic reactions caused by flea bites.   How Bravecto Plus Works Bravecto Plus contains two powerful active ingredients that work together for broad-spectrum protection: Fluralaner Acts as a potent ectoparasiticide, killing fleas and ticks that live and breed on the skin. It provides rapid action and long-lasting control, stopping infestations before they worsen. Moxidectin Targets internal parasites by binding to glutamate-gated chloride ion channels essential to invertebrate nerve and muscle function. This results in the elimination of intestinal worms and effective prevention of heartworm disease . Easy & Reliable Application Bravecto Plus features the innovative TWIST’N’USE™ spot-on tube , making every application simple, accurate, and stress-free. The topical format removes the challenge of tablets, ensuring dependable protection even for cats that resist oral medications. Key Benefits Treats fleas, paralysis ticks, intestinal worms, and ear mites Helps prevent heartworm disease Protects against fleas for 3 months Protects against paralysis ticks for 10 weeks Prevents heartworm for 3 months Breaks the flea life cycle before eggs are laid Supports treatment of flea allergy dermatitis (FAD) Easy, mess-free spot-on application Long-lasting protection from a single dose Parasite Coverage at a Glance Fleas: 3 months Paralysis ticks: 10 weeks Heartworm: 3 months Ear mites: Controlled Gastrointestinal worms: Roundworm & hookworm               .
